title: No-Code AI Builder: Automate Anything
modules: What Workflows Are and Why They Break
Connect the Pieces: Triggers, Actions, Logic
Add AI to a Real Automation You Built
Launch and Defend Your Workflow Design
synopsis: Your school's student council has five chaotic, manual processes that are eating up everyone's time — and you've been handed access to no-code AI tools and two weeks to fix as many as you can. Every design choice has a trade-off you'll have to live with.
rationale: No-code AI workflow tools are already reshaping entry-level work, and teens who can design, connect, and critically evaluate automated systems will have a significant practical advantage within years of leaving school.
learning_outcome: Students can design and build a multi-step automated workflow that incorporates at least one AI action, test it against failure cases, and present a clear rationale for the design decisions they made.
source_signals: Launch HN: AgentHub (YC W24) – A no-code automation platform
Show HN: I quit coding years ago. AI brought me back
How to learn AI for students & professionals (guide)
